steps.title: Foundations
steps.objective: Build essential groundwork for your career
tasks: Set up your learning workspace

children.title: Industry Fundamentals
children.objective: Understand the core concepts of activism officer
tasks: Lead a capstone or team project solving a realistic problem in activism officer

Build a public portfolio showcasing projects related to activism officer
